data.title: Analysts cut forecasts on Lennox International after Q3 earnings; EPS $6.98, missing sales to $1.426B, lowered FY2025 guidance.
data.description: Lennox International Inc (NYSE: LII) announced strong third-quarter earnings results but revised its full-year 2025 outlook on Wednesday. The company reported earnings of $6.98 per share for the quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of $6.86 per share. However, quarterly sales were reported at $1.426 billion, falling short of the expected $1.490 billion. Lennox adjusted its full-year 2025 EPS guidance from $23.25-$24.25 to $22.75-$23.25 and anticipates a 1% decrease in revenue. The company attributes these adjustments to the refrigerant transition impact and challenging macroeconomic conditions in 2025. The Lennox team is responding with flexibility and focus amidst this uncertain period. Find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TransUnion beats Q3 estimates with $1.10 EPS and $1.17B revenue, up 5.8% and 7.8% YoY respectively, maintaining 36.3% EBITDA margin.
data.description: TransUnion (TRU) released their Q3 earnings report, surpassing Wall Street expectations. The company posted adjusted earnings of $1.10 per share, up 5.8% from last year's $1.04 per share and beating the consensus estimate of $1.04. Quarterly revenue reached $1.17 billion, a 7.8% increase from the previous year's $1.08 billion and exceeding analysts' predictions of $1.13 billion. Adjusted EBITDA margin remained steady at 36.3% compared to the same quarter in 2024. As of September 30, TransUnion held $750 million in cash. They have repurchased $200 million in shares this year and expanded their share repurchase authorization to $1 billion. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Snappy Kraken introduces bidirectional CRM integration for marketing, unifying CRM, automation, analytics. #fintech
data.description: In Ormond Beach, Florida, Snappy Kraken, a martech company focusing on enhancing financial advisor marketing efforts, revealed its latest CRM integrations. This groundbreaking development marks the first bidirectional integration in the advisor marketing sector, facilitating real-time data flow. Snappy Kraken now stands out as the sole platform adept at harmonizing CRM, marketing automation, and analytics within one comprehensive system. The innovative CRM integration supports ongoing synchronization between a wide range of financial advisors and their clients.

data.title: Saudi Arabia smart home appliances market expected to reach $8.56 Billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 27.10%, from $2.03 Billion in 2024. Major players include Haier, LG, Samsung, and more.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Saudi Arabia Smart Home Appliances Market, By Region, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market for smart home appliances in Saudi Arabia was valued at USD 2.03 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 8.56 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 27.10%. The substantial growth in the Saudi Arabia Smart Home Appliances market is mainly attributed to the effects of rapid urbanization and a growing demand for such products.

data.title: Druid AI unveils self-building AI agents at Symbiosis 4 events in London and New York, debuting Virtual Authoring Teams on Oct. 22 with continued advancements highlighted on Nov. 6.
data.description: In London, Druid AI, a leading AI innovator based in the US, unveiled a significant development at Symbiosis 4 on October 22. The company is set to showcase its latest strides in enterprise automation at Symbiosis 4 New York on Nov. 6. Among the innovations revealed is the introduction of Virtual Authoring Teams, a groundbreaking advancement featuring self-generating AI agents capable of creating, testing, and implementing other AI agents. This unveiling solidifies Druid AI's position as a key player in human-centered AI technology.

data.title: Supermicro's Q1'26 update reveals $12B in design wins, with earnings call scheduled for Nov. 4 at 5pm EST.
data.description: Super Micro Computer, Inc., a Total IT Solution Provider specializing in AI, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge technologies (Nasdaq: SMCI), based in San Jose, Calif., released a business update for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 (Q1'26), which concluded on September 30, 2025. The company has scheduled an earnings call for November 4th at 5pm EST. They reported recent design wins exceeding $12 billion, with deliveries expected in the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 (Q2’26). Further details will be provided during the upcoming earnings call.

data.title: Del Frisco's Grille introduces revamped brunch menu with 9 new dishes, shareable experiences, craft cocktails in Houston.
data.description: Del Frisco's Grille in Houston introduced a new weekend-only menu on October 23, 2025. The menu includes creative dishes and a build-and-share beverage program. This contemporary American bar and grill is renowned for its innovative take on upscale yet accessible dining. The revamped brunch menu is exclusive to weekends and offers a fresh culinary experience to patrons.

data.title: $5.9M benefits for healthcare systems from eHealth Connect® platform, with $4.7M savings, $1.2M profits, 93% ROI.
data.description: An AI-powered system for retrieving records resulted in savings of $4.7 million and profit gains of $1.2 million, achieving an impressive return on investment (ROI) of 93%. The solution paid for itself in a short period.

data.title: IM Cannabis to acquire 60% stake in quantum computing company for up to $54 million. Deal signed in Toronto and Glil Yam.
data.description: Today, IM Cannabis Corp. ("IMC" or the "Company") revealed the signing of a non-binding indicative term sheet for proposed securities. The leading medical cannabis company, with bases in Israel and Germany, made this announcement. This development was disclosed on October 23, 2025, in Toronto and Glil Yam, Israel. IM Cannabis Corp., listed on NASDAQ as IMCC, is expanding its reach with this new agreement.

data.title: StubHub partners with Peachtree Entertainment for 19+ live music events nationwide, offering fans secure ticket access.
data.description: In New York, StubHub, a top global secondary ticketing marketplace, revealed a fresh collaboration with Peachtree Entertainment, a rapidly expanding live entertainment organization in the U.S. This partnership designates StubHub as an “Official Partner” of Peachtree Entertainment, offering fans easy and safe access to tickets for over 19 live music events nationwide. The events include the prominent Rock the Country tour and a variety of other high-profile concerts. This collaboration aims to enhance the ticket purchasing experience for fans across the nation.

data.title: GenAI adoption by enterprises has surged, moving from experiments to production deployments. - Stamford, Conn. - #AI - $III
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, the adoption of GenAI by enterprises has seen significant growth in the last year, transitioning from proof-of-concept trials to full production deployments, according to ISG. This evolution highlights the increasing acceptance and utilization of artificial intelligence in business settings.

data.title: GPD Optoelectronics Corp. secures $14.5M contract to enhance rugged optical receiver technology, awarded for developing next-gen software-defined tactical optical modem.
data.description: A U.S. manufacturer, GPD Optoelectronics Corp. (GPD), based in Salem, N.H., has secured a $14,455,986 contract to create an advanced Software-defined Tactical Optical Modem (STOMPeR). The development will involve utilizing InGaAs and Germanium photodiodes for improved performance and durability. This initiative, formerly identified as Rugged Adaptive Detection and Signaling (RADS) technology, underscores GPD's expertise in supplying vital optical components for critical missions, enhancing their position in the market.

data.title: Fintap secures $86.5MM for growth and innovation: $82.5MM credit facility and $4MM corporate note.
data.description: Today, in Clifton, New Jersey, Fintap, a technology-based specialty finance firm, revealed the finalization of a credit facility totaling up to $82.5 million and a corporate note of up to $4 million. This marks a substantial growth from its financing in 2021. The new capital injection signifies a significant milestone for the company, providing it with substantial financial resources to support its operations and expansion plans.

data.title: Trump's sanctions on Russia's oil sector led to a 5% jump in WTI crude futures to over $61/bbl, boosting 10 US energy stocks.
data.description: New sanctions imposed by President Donald Trump on Russia's top oil companies have stirred up energy markets. This led to a crude oil rally, with West Texas Intermediate (WTI) futures surging over 5% to trade above $61 per barrel by 8:30 a.m. ET. This turnaround followed a recent low of $56, the weakest price seen since April 2025. The U.S. Treasury put these sanctions in place as part of efforts to push Moscow towards a ceasefire in Ukraine. The sanctions impacted Rosneft and Lukoil, the two biggest Russian oil producers, along with more than 30 subsidiaries associated with exploration, refining, and distribution. This move was a response to President Putin's persistence in the conflict in Ukraine.

data.title: Advisors Asset Management introduces lowest cost CLO ETF, AAM Crescent CLO ETF (CLOC), providing access to investment grade CLOs. Monument, Colo. and Los Angeles, Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: Advisors Asset Management (AAM) recently unveiled a new opportunity for investors with the introduction of CLOC, providing access to investment grade Collateralized Loan Obligations (CLOs). The CLOs will be managed by one of the most reputable CLO managers in the industry. This initiative was announced in Monument, Colorado and Los Angeles on October 23, 2025. AAM, known for its innovative investment solutions, aims to offer a unique investment avenue with CLOC, catering to the evolving needs of investors.

data.title: Enterprises embrace Oracle Payments by Adyen for seamless customer experiences in various industries.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, in Austin, Texas, and San Francisco, Oracle Payments unveiled a comprehensive embedded payments platform for industries including restaurants, sports & entertainment, hospitality, and healthcare. This platform aims to streamline financial transactions across various sectors. This initiative demonstrates Oracle's commitment to enhancing payment processes for businesses worldwide.
